the onboarding screen 4 looks unaligned , fix it , check the image how it should look like 

figma : Implement this design from Figma.
@https://www.figma.com/design/LHoetNRWvi3K4FQcqnfw0v/Untitled?node-id=37-251&m=dev

check the HTML code for ref ( with image in base44 format ) :

<div data-layer="Safety & Scoring" class="SafetyScoring" style="width: 430px; background: white; overflow: hidden; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; align-items: flex-start; display: inline-flex">
  <div data-layer="Container" class="Container" style="align-self: stretch; flex: 1 1 0; position: relative; background: #F2F5F3; overflow: hidden">
    <div data-layer="Header" class="Header" style="width: 430px; height: 116px; left: 0px; top: 0px; position: absolute">
      <div data-layer="Button" class="Button" style="width: 44px; height: 44px; left: 12px; top: 56px; position: absolute; border-radius: 16777200px">
        <div data-svg-wrapper data-layer="Container" class="Container" style="left: 10px; top: 10px; position: absolute">
          <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <path d="M20 12H4M4 12L10 6M4 12L10 18" stroke="#1A1D1C" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div data-layer="Container" class="Container" style="width: 430px; height: 816px; left: 0px; top: 116px; position: absolute">
      <div data-layer="Container" class="Container" style="width: 366px; height: 83px; left: 32px; top: 564px; position: absolute"></div>
